title: Error - New app feature build upload failed
excerpt:
I’m trying to upload a new build for a feature but monday keeps showing the message : “New app feature build upload failed”… 
  
And in the Feature section, it looks like the zip file that I added is in a constant loadin…

posts.author: tmanney (Theresa)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to upload a new build for a feature but monday keeps showing the message : “New app feature build upload failed”…

Screenshot 2025-02-13 at 8.26.31 AM686×210 9.55 KB

And in the Feature section, it looks like the zip file that I added is in a constant loading state.

Screenshot 2025-02-13 at 8.28.20 AM1068×340 22.3 KB

In the console the message show is:

“Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 400 ()”

I can’t find an aswer to this issue in any of the docs or within the developer community, can someone here help me resolve my issue?

posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @tmanney how have you been?
Could you please open a support ticket for this one, providing all the relevent data?
Thanks:)
